//<script>
(async () => {
  'use strict'
  const NAME = 'BETTER_SPEEDTEST', BIN = '/data/plugins/better-speedtest/better-speedtest'
  const DIR = '/data/plugins/better-speedtest', LOG = '/tmp/better-speedtest.log', CFG = DIR + '/config.json'
  const SCALE = 1000
  const DEFAULT_BIN_URL = 'https://tapan.top/d/UFITOOLS-U60Pro/file/better-speedtest-linux-{arch}'
  // device model shown in the header — read from the panel (UFI_DATA) at runtime
  // so it works on any UFI-TOOLS device (never hardcoded to one model).
  const devName = () => {
    const d = (typeof UFI_DATA !== 'undefined' && UFI_DATA) || {}
    return d.nickname || d.model || d.device_model || d.deviceModel || d.device_name || d.product || d.name || 'better-speedtest'
  }
  const BIN_SOURCES = [
    { url: DEFAULT_BIN_URL, proxy: '' },
    { url: 'https://github.com/Gaimoydev/better-speedtest/releases/latest/download/better-speedtest-linux-{arch}', proxy: 'https://gh-proxy.org/' },
    { url: 'https://github.com/Gaimoydev/better-speedtest/releases/latest/download/better-speedtest-linux-{arch}', proxy: 'https://ghfast.top/' },
    { url: 'https://github.com/Gaimoydev/better-speedtest/releases/latest/download/better-speedtest-linux-{arch}', proxy: '' }
  ]
  const LOG_TAG = (...a) => console.log(`[${NAME}]`, ...a)

  if (typeof window.runShellWithRoot !== 'function') {
    window.runShellWithRoot = async (cmd, timeoutMs = 30000) => {
      try {
        const base = (typeof KANO_baseURL !== 'undefined' && KANO_baseURL) ? KANO_baseURL : '/api'
        const headers = { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
        if (typeof common_headers !== 'undefined' && common_headers) { Object.assign(headers, common_headers); headers['Content-Type'] = 'application/json' }
        const res = await fetch(`${base}/run_shell`, { method: 'POST', headers, body: JSON.stringify({ cmd: String(cmd), timeout: Number(timeoutMs) || 30000 }) })
        if (!res.ok) return { success: false, content: `HTTP ${res.status}` }
        const d = await res.json(); return { success: !!d.success, content: d.content || '' }
      } catch (e) { return { success: false, content: String(e && e.message || e) } }
    }
  }
  const sh = (c, ms) => runShellWithRoot(c, ms)
  const wait = (ms = 100) => new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, ms))
  const fadeIn = (el, ms = 300) => { if (!el) return; el.style.opacity = '0'; requestAnimationFrame(() => { el.style.transition = `opacity ${ms}ms ease`; el.style.opacity = '1' }) }
  const prettyMsg = m => {
    if (/^iface=/.test(m)) return '正在检测网络与定位…'
    let x = m.match(/^(.+?)\s+[\d.]+:\d+\s+ping=[\d.]+ms\s+(下载中|上传中)/); if (x) return `${x[1]} · ${x[2]}`
    x = m.match(/^(.+?)\s+ping=([\d.]+)ms$/); if (x) return `${x[1]} · 延迟 ${Math.round(+x[2])}ms`
    x = m.match(/^(.+?)\s+(下载中|上传中)$/); if (x) return `${x[1]} · ${x[2]}`
    return m
  }
  const esc = s => String(s == null ? '' : s).replace(/[&<>"']/g, c => ({ '&': '&amp;', '<': '&lt;', '>': '&gt;', '"': '&quot;', "'": '&#39;' }[c]))
  const jparse = s => { try { return JSON.parse(s) } catch (e) { return null } }
  const toB64 = s => { const b = new TextEncoder().encode(s); let x = ''; for (const c of b) x += String.fromCharCode(c); return btoa(x) }
  const lsGet = (k, d) => { try { const v = localStorage.getItem(k); return v === null ? d : v } catch (e) { return d } }
  const lsSet = (k, v) => { try { localStorage.setItem(k, v) } catch (e) {} }
  const shq = s => "'" + String(s).replace(/'/g, "'\\''") + "'"
  const isRoot = async () => ((await sh('id -u', 3000)).content || '').trim() === '0'
  while (typeof UFI_DATA === 'undefined' || !UFI_DATA) await wait()

  const readCfg = async () => jparse(((await sh(`cat ${CFG} 2>/dev/null`, 5000)).content || '').trim()) || {}
  const writeCfg = async obj => { await sh(`mkdir -p ${DIR}; echo '${toB64(JSON.stringify(obj, null, 2))}' | base64 -d > ${CFG} && echo ok`, 6000) }
  const patchCfg = async patch => { const c = await readCfg(); deepMerge(c, patch); await writeCfg(c); return c }
  function deepMerge(dst, src) { for (const k in src) { const s = src[k]; if (s && typeof s === 'object' && !Array.isArray(s) && dst[k] && typeof dst[k] === 'object' && !Array.isArray(dst[k])) deepMerge(dst[k], s); else dst[k] = s } }

  const _cfg0 = await readCfg(); const UI0 = (_cfg0 && _cfg0.ui) || {}
  let _uiPending = {}, _uiT = null
  const saveUI = p => { Object.assign(_uiPending, p); clearTimeout(_uiT); _uiT = setTimeout(() => { const q = _uiPending; _uiPending = {}; patchCfg({ ui: q }) }, 600) }
  const selHTML = (id, cls, opts, cur) => { const c = opts.find(o => o.v === cur) || opts[0]; return `<div class="st-drop ${cls || ''}"${id ? ` id="${id}"` : ''} data-value="${esc(c.v)}"><button type="button" class="st-drop-btn">${esc(c.label)}<span class="st-drop-caret">▾</span></button><div class="st-drop-menu">${opts.map(o => `<div class="st-drop-opt${o.v === c.v ? ' on' : ''}" data-v="${esc(o.v)}">${esc(o.label)}</div>`).join('')}</div></div>` }
  const ACC = UI0.acc || lsGet(NAME + '_acc', '#5be9c6')
  if (!document.getElementById(NAME + '_css')) document.head.appendChild(Object.assign(document.createElement('style'), { id: NAME + '_css' })).textContent = `
@font-face{font-family:'Torus';src:url('data:font/otf;base64,') format('opentype');font-weight:400;font-display:swap}
@font-face{font-family:'PFcjk';src:url('/api/uploads/PingFang.woff2') format('woff2');font-display:swap}
#${NAME}_panel{--acc:${ACC};--bg:#0c0d10;--txt:#f3f4f6;--muted:#9a9ea8;--muted2:#61646d;--line:rgba(255,255,255,.07);--line2:rgba(255,255,255,.035);--mono:'Torus','PFcjk','PingFang SC',system-ui,sans-serif;--code:ui-monospace,"Cascadia Mono",Menlo,Consolas,monospace;color:var(--txt);font-family:'Torus','PFcjk','PingFang SC','Microsoft YaHei',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;width:100%;max-width:560px;margin:auto!important;position:static!important;inset:auto!important;background:transparent!important;box-shadow:none!important;padding:0!important;border:0!important}
#${NAME}_panel *{box-sizing:border-box}
.st-card{background:var(--bg);border:0;border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;box-shadow:0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.06),0 28px 70px -16px rgba(0,0,0,.66),0 10px 26px -6px rgba(0,0,0,.46)}
.st-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:18px 22px 4px}
#${NAME}_panel.modal .st-head{padding-right:54px}
.st-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px}
.st-mark{width:27px;height:27px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex:0 0 auto}
.st-mark svg{width:27px;height:27px;display:block}
.st-dev{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.2px}
.st-sub{font-size:9.5px;color:var(--muted2);letter-spacing:3px;font-family:var(--mono);margin-top:1px}
.st-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
.st-gsec{padding:6px 22px 0}
.st-gwrap{position:relative;width:100%;max-width:340px;margin:0 auto;aspect-ratio:360/280}
.st-gwrap svg{display:block;width:100%;height:100%;overflow:visible}
.st-track{stroke:rgba(255,255,255,.07);fill:none;stroke-linecap:round}
.st-arc{stroke:var(--acc);fill:none;stroke-linecap:round;transition:stroke-dashoffset .32s cubic-bezier(.3,.7,.3,1)}
.st-ticklab{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;fill:var(--muted2)}
.st-gc{position:absolute;left:50%;top:52%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);text-align:center;width:80%;pointer-events:none}
.st-gnum{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;font-size:clamp(34px,9vw,46px);line-height:.9;letter-spacing:-2.5px;color:var(--txt);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;max-width:100%}
.st-gunit{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:12px;color:var(--acc);letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:8px}
.st-glabel{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:10px;letter-spacing:.5px}
.st-gpeak{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted2);margin:4px auto 0;max-width:230px;line-height:1.35;white-space:normal;overflow:hidden}
.st-gpeak b{color:var(--muted);font-weight:600}
.st-gstat{display:none;text-align:center;padding:0 10px;max-width:210px;margin:0 auto}
.st-gwrap.st-starting .st-gnum,.st-gwrap.st-starting .st-gunit,.st-gwrap.st-starting .st-glabel,.st-gwrap.st-starting .st-gpeak{display:none}
.st-gwrap.st-starting .st-gstat{display:block}
.st-gstat-txt{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:13px;color:var(--txt);letter-spacing:.2px;line-height:1.5;max-width:186px;margin:0 auto;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.st-gstat-dots{display:flex;gap:5px;justify-content:center;margin-top:13px}
.st-gstat-dots i{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--acc);animation:st-dot 1.15s ease-in-out infinite}
.st-gstat-dots i:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.15s}
.st-gstat-dots i:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.3s}
@keyframes st-dot{0%,75%,100%{opacity:.25;transform:scale(.72)}38%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}}
.st-gwrap.st-num{aspect-ratio:360/200;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.st-gwrap.st-num .st-gc{position:static;transform:none;width:100%}
.st-gwrap.st-num .st-gnum{font-size:clamp(48px,17vw,88px);letter-spacing:-3px;max-width:100%}
.st-blob{position:absolute;left:50%;top:50%;width:56%;aspect-ratio:1;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,var(--acc) 0%,transparent 66%);filter:blur(28px);transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.7);opacity:.3;transition:transform .5s cubic-bezier(.3,.7,.3,1),opacity .5s ease;animation:st-breathe 3.6s ease-in-out infinite;pointer-events:none}
@keyframes st-breathe{0%,100%{filter:blur(26px)}50%{filter:blur(36px)}}
.st-num-roll{display:inline-flex;align-items:flex-start;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;font-feature-settings:"tnum" 1}
/* soft-fade the roll's top/bottom so the odometer clip doesn't read as a hard container edge during scroll */
.st-dcol{-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 0,#000 6%,#000 90%,transparent 100%);mask-image:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 0,#000 6%,#000 90%,transparent 100%)}
.st-dcol{display:inline-block;overflow:hidden;height:1em;line-height:1}
.st-dstrip{display:block;transition:transform .56s cubic-bezier(.34,1.2,.5,1);will-change:transform,filter}
.st-dstrip.st-roll{animation:st-mblur .5s ease-out}
@keyframes st-mblur{0%{filter:blur(4px)}60%{filter:blur(2px)}100%{filter:blur(0)}}
.st-dstrip>span{display:block;height:1em;line-height:1;text-align:center}
.st-dfix{display:inline-block;line-height:1}
.st-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);padding:4px 12px 2px}
.st-stat{padding:9px 10px;text-align:left;border-left:1px solid var(--line2)}
.st-stat:first-child{border-left:0}
.st-sk{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px}
.st-sv{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:600;font-size:22px;margin-top:6px;letter-spacing:-.5px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
.st-sv em{font-style:normal;font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted2);margin-left:3px;font-weight:400}
.st-node{display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:10px;padding:10px 22px 2px;font-size:12px}
.st-nt{font-weight:600;color:var(--txt)}
.st-ns{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted2);letter-spacing:.5px;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}
.st-csec{padding:12px 18px 2px}
.st-chead{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 4px 6px}
.st-ctitle{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted2);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;font-family:var(--mono)}
.st-legend{display:flex;gap:14px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted)}
.st-lg b{font-family:var(--mono);color:var(--txt);font-weight:600;margin-left:3px}
.st-lg.dl{color:var(--acc)}
.st-cwrap svg{display:block;width:100%;height:auto;overflow:visible}
.st-gline{stroke:var(--line2)}
.st-glab{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:9px;fill:var(--muted2)}
.st-trace{fill:none;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;transition:d .3s cubic-bezier(.33,.85,.4,1)}
.st-carea{transition:d .3s cubic-bezier(.33,.85,.4,1)}
.st-ctrls{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:14px 20px 8px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.st-btn{font-size:12.5px;font-weight:550;color:var(--txt);cursor:pointer;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:9px;background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--line);transition:background .15s,border-color .15s,transform .1s;user-select:none}
.st-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.14)}
.st-btn:active{transform:translateY(1px)}
.st-btn[disabled]{opacity:.45;cursor:not-allowed}
.st-btn.primary{color:#04140f;background:var(--acc);border-color:var(--acc);font-weight:600}
.st-btn.primary:hover{filter:brightness(1.06);background:var(--acc)}
.st-btn.danger{color:#fff;background:#e0564f;border-color:#e0564f;font-weight:600}
.st-btn.danger:hover{filter:brightness(1.06);background:#e0564f}
.st-btn.ghost{color:var(--muted);border-color:var(--line2);padding:8px 11px}
.st-btn.ghost:hover{color:var(--txt)}
.st-seg-toggle{display:inline-flex;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:9px;overflow:hidden}
.st-seg-toggle button{font-size:11.5px;font-weight:550;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;padding:8px 11px;background:transparent;border:0;border-left:1px solid var(--line2);transition:color .2s ease,background .3s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1)}
.st-seg-toggle button:first-child{border-left:0}
.st-seg-toggle button.on{color:#04140f;background:var(--acc)}
#${NAME}_typesel{border:0;gap:5px;overflow:visible;flex-wrap:wrap}
#${NAME}_typesel button{border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px}
#${NAME}_typesel button:first-child{border-left:1px solid var(--line)}
.st-status{margin-left:auto;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted2);letter-spacing:.5px}
.st-sel,.st-input{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11.5px;color:var(--txt);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:7px 9px}
.st-drop{position:relative;display:inline-block;vertical-align:middle}
.st-drop-btn{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11.5px;color:var(--txt);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:7px 24px 7px 9px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;text-align:left;min-width:64px;width:100%}
.st-drop-caret{position:absolute;right:8px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:9px;color:var(--muted2);pointer-events:none;transition:color .15s}
.st-drop.open .st-drop-btn{border-color:var(--acc)}
.st-drop.open .st-drop-caret{color:var(--acc)}
.st-drop-menu{display:none;position:absolute;z-index:40;top:calc(100% + 4px);left:0;min-width:100%;background:#12141b;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:8px;padding:4px;box-shadow:0 10px 28px rgba(0,0,0,.55)}
.st-drop.open .st-drop-menu{display:block}
.st-drop-opt{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11.5px;color:var(--txt);padding:6px 10px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap}
.st-drop-opt:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06)}
.st-drop-opt.on{color:var(--acc)}
.st-input{width:100%}
.st-log{margin:6px 18px 16px;border-top:1px solid var(--line2)}
.st-log summary{list-style:none;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:11px 4px;font-size:11.5px;font-weight:550;color:var(--muted)}
.st-log summary::-webkit-details-marker{display:none}
.st-log summary .chev{margin-left:auto;transition:transform .25s;color:var(--muted2)}
.st-log[open] summary .chev{transform:rotate(90deg)}
.st-logbody{font-family:var(--code);font-size:11px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--muted2);padding:0 4px 12px;white-space:pre-wrap;max-height:190px;overflow:auto}
.st-close{position:absolute;top:15px;right:16px;z-index:2;width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--line);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:14px;line-height:1}
.st-close:hover{color:var(--txt);background:rgba(255,255,255,.04)}
.st-mask{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(6,7,9,.7);backdrop-filter:blur(4px);z-index:99998;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:center;padding:36px 14px;overflow:auto;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1)}
.st-mask.st-show{opacity:1}
/* Apple-style modal entrance: gentle scale + rise, well-tuned spring-ish ease */
#${NAME}_panel{transform:scale(.955) translateY(10px);opacity:0;transition:transform .44s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1),opacity .3s ease}
.st-mask.st-show #${NAME}_panel{transform:none;opacity:1}
.st-settings{padding:0 20px 6px;display:none}
.st-settings.on{display:block}
.st-fs{border-top:1px solid var(--line2);padding:13px 2px 4px;margin-top:6px}
.st-fs h4{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted2);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;margin:0 0 11px;font-family:var(--mono)}
.st-row{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:9px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.st-row label{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);min-width:70px}
.st-cdn-item{display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:6px}
.st-cdn-item .st-input{flex:1}
.st-x{cursor:pointer;color:var(--muted);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:7px;padding:6px 9px;font-size:12px;background:transparent}
.st-x:hover{color:#ff7a7a;border-color:rgba(255,120,120,.3)}
/* ---- accent color: native browser color picker ---- */
.st-color{width:38px;height:28px;padding:0;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:7px;background:transparent;cursor:pointer;vertical-align:middle}
.st-color::-webkit-color-swatch-wrapper{padding:2px}
.st-color::-webkit-color-swatch{border:0;border-radius:5px}
/* ---- responsive: wide viewport (PC) => 2-column dashboard inside the modal (more info); narrow (mobile) => vertical hero ---- */
@media(min-width:880px){
  #${NAME}_panel{max-width:912px}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-card{display:grid;grid-template-columns:344px 1fr;column-gap:10px;align-items:start;
    grid-template-areas:"head head" "gauge stats" "gauge node" "gauge chart" "ctrls ctrls" "picker picker" "settings settings" "log log"}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-head{grid-area:head}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-gsec{grid-area:gauge;align-self:center;padding-bottom:12px}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-stats{grid-area:stats;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;align-self:start;padding-top:16px}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-node{grid-area:node}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-csec{grid-area:chart}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-ctrls{grid-area:ctrls}
  #${NAME}_panel #${NAME}_picker{grid-area:picker}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-settings{grid-area:settings}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-log{grid-area:log}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-gwrap{max-width:300px}
  /* PC: settings flow in 2 columns (save vertical space); wide sections span full width */
  #${NAME}_panel .st-settings.on{columns:2;column-gap:22px}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-settings .st-fs{break-inside:avoid;-webkit-column-break-inside:avoid;margin-top:0;padding-top:13px}
  #${NAME}_panel .st-settings .st-fs.wide{column-span:all}
  /* CDN source editor: 2 symmetric columns; a lone last (odd) row spans both */
  #${NAME}_panel #${NAME}_cdnlist{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;column-gap:14px;row-gap:6px}
  #${NAME}_panel #${NAME}_cdnlist .st-cdn-item{margin-bottom:0}
  #${NAME}_panel #${NAME}_cdnlist .st-cdn-item:last-child:nth-child(odd){grid-column:1 / -1}
}
/* ---- node / CDN picker (tabbed, visible list) ---- */
.st-picker{padding:0 20px 4px;display:none}
.st-picker.on{display:block}
.st-pk-tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line2);padding:12px 0 0}
.st-pk-tab{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);cursor:pointer;padding:8px 12px;border:0;background:transparent;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;margin-bottom:-1px}
.st-pk-tab.on{color:var(--txt);border-bottom-color:var(--acc)}
.st-pk-tools{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;padding:8px 2px 2px}
.st-pk-list{max-height:236px;overflow:auto;padding:6px 0}
.st-pk-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;padding:9px 10px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12.5px}
.st-pk-row:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.045)}
.st-pk-row.sel{background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--acc) 15%,transparent);outline:1px solid color-mix(in srgb,var(--acc) 42%,transparent)}
.st-pk-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--txt);white-space:nowrap}
.st-pk-meta{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10.5px;color:var(--muted2);overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;flex:1;text-align:right}
.st-pk-tag{font-size:9px;font-family:var(--mono);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--muted)}
.st-pk-empty{color:var(--muted2);font-size:12px;padding:18px 10px;text-align:center}
/* ---- first-run init / onboarding (binary not installed) ---- */
.st-init{display:none;padding:40px 26px 36px;text-align:center}
#${NAME}_panel.need-init .st-card{display:block!important}
#${NAME}_panel.need-init .st-gsec,#${NAME}_panel.need-init .st-stats,#${NAME}_panel.need-init .st-node,#${NAME}_panel.need-init .st-csec,#${NAME}_panel.need-init .st-ctrls,#${NAME}_panel.need-init #${NAME}_picker,#${NAME}_panel.need-init .st-settings,#${NAME}_panel.need-init .st-log{display:none!important}
#${NAME}_panel.need-init .st-init{display:block;animation:st-fadein .42s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1)}
@keyframes st-fadein{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
.st-init-icon{width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:16px;background:color-mix(in srgb,var(--acc) 12%,transparent);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin:0 auto 20px}
.st-init-icon svg{width:30px;height:30px}
.st-init-title{font-size:19px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.3px}
.st-init-desc{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);margin:8px auto 0;line-height:1.6;max-width:330px}
.st-init-arch{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted2);margin-top:16px}
.st-init-bar{height:8px;border-radius:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);overflow:hidden;margin:14px auto 0;max-width:360px}
.st-init-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:5px;background:var(--acc);transition:width .45s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1)}
.st-init-pct{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:9px;min-height:16px}
.st-init-actions{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin-top:20px}
.st-init-more{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;margin:16px auto 0;max-width:380px;text-align:left}
.st-init-mrow{display:flex;gap:8px}
.st-init-mrow .st-input{flex:1}
.st-init-upload{display:block;text-align:center;font-size:12px;color:var(--acc);cursor:pointer;padding:9px;border:1px dashed var(--line);border-radius:9px;transition:background .15s}
.st-init-upload:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03)}
.st-init-hint{font-size:11.5px;line-height:1.45;color:var(--muted2);text-align:center;margin-top:-2px;overflow-wrap:anywhere}
.st-init-hint a{color:var(--acc);text-decoration:none}
.st-init-hint b{color:var(--txt);font-weight:650}
#${NAME}_panel.st-reveal .st-gsec,#${NAME}_panel.st-reveal .st-stats,#${NAME}_panel.st-reveal .st-node,#${NAME}_panel.st-reveal .st-csec,#${NAME}_panel.st-reveal .st-ctrls{animation:st-fadein .52s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1)}
`

  const NS = 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'
  const svel = (t, a) => { const e = document.createElementNS(NS, t); for (const k in a) e.setAttribute(k, a[k]); return e }
  const GA = { cx: 180, cy: 168, r: 122, start: 135, sweep: 270, max: SCALE }
  const pol = (r, deg) => { const a = deg * Math.PI / 180; return [GA.cx + r * Math.cos(a), GA.cy + r * Math.sin(a)] }
  const arcPath = (r, a0, a1) => { const p0 = pol(r, a0), p1 = pol(r, a1); return `M${p0[0].toFixed(2)} ${p0[1].toFixed(2)} A${r} ${r} 0 ${(a1 - a0) > 180 ? 1 : 0} 1 ${p1[0].toFixed(2)} ${p1[1].toFixed(2)}` }

  function buildGauge(host) {
    const svg = svel('svg', { viewBox: '0 0 360 280' })
    const d = arcPath(GA.r, GA.start, GA.start + GA.sweep)
    const track = svel('path', { d, class: 'st-track', 'stroke-width': '9' })
    const prog = svel('path', { d, class: 'st-arc', 'stroke-width': '9' })
    svg.appendChild(track); svg.appendChild(prog)
    for (const mk of [0, GA.max]) { const dg = GA.start + (mk / GA.max) * GA.sweep, lp = pol(GA.r - 20, dg), tx = svel('text', { x: lp[0].toFixed(1), y: (lp[1] + 3).toFixed(1), class: 'st-ticklab', 'text-anchor': 'middle' }); tx.textContent = mk; svg.appendChild(tx) }
    host.appendChild(svg)
    const len = prog.getTotalLength(); prog.style.strokeDasharray = len; prog.style.strokeDashoffset = len
    return { set(v) { prog.style.strokeDashoffset = len * (1 - Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v / GA.max))) } }
  }

  const CW = 640, CHV = 190, PL = 44, PR = 12, PT = 10, PB = 26
  const cx0 = PL, cx1 = CW - PR, cy0 = PT, cy1 = CHV - PB, plotW = cx1 - cx0, plotH = cy1 - cy0
  function buildChart(host, durS) {
    const svg = svel('svg', { viewBox: `0 0 ${CW} ${CHV}` })
    const g = svel('g', {}); svg.appendChild(g)
    const yAt = v => cy1 - (Math.max(0, Math.min(SCALE, v)) / SCALE) * plotH
    const xAt = t => cx0 + (Math.max(0, Math.min(durS, t)) / durS) * plotW
    for (const yv of [0, 500, 1000]) { const yy = yAt(yv); g.appendChild(svel('line', { x1: cx0, y1: yy.toFixed(1), x2: cx1, y2: yy.toFixed(1), class: 'st-gline' })); const yl = svel('text', { x: cx0 - 7, y: (yy + 3).toFixed(1), class: 'st-glab', 'text-anchor': 'end' }); yl.textContent = yv; g.appendChild(yl) }
    const step = durS <= 8 ? 2 : durS <= 20 ? 5 : 10
    for (let xv = 0; xv <= durS; xv += step) { const xx = xAt(xv), xl = svel('text', { x: xx.toFixed(1), y: cy1 + 15, class: 'st-glab', 'text-anchor': 'middle' }); xl.textContent = xv + 's'; g.appendChild(xl) }
    const area = svel('path', { d: '', class: 'st-carea', fill: 'var(--acc)', opacity: '.06' })
    const lineUl = svel('path', { class: 'st-trace', d: '', stroke: 'var(--muted2)', 'stroke-width': '1.5', opacity: '.85' })
    const lineDl = svel('path', { class: 'st-trace', d: '', stroke: 'var(--acc)', 'stroke-width': '2.4' })
    svg.appendChild(area); svg.appendChild(lineUl); svg.appendChild(lineDl); host.appendChild(svg)
    const path = pts => pts.map((p, i) => (i ? 'L' : 'M') + xAt(p[0]).toFixed(1) + ' ' + yAt(p[1]).toFixed(1)).join(' ')
    return {
      update(dl, ul) {
        if (dl.length) { lineDl.setAttribute('d', path(dl)); area.setAttribute('d', path(dl) + ` L${xAt(dl[dl.length - 1][0]).toFixed(1)} ${cy1} L${cx0} ${cy1} Z`) }
        if (ul.length) lineUl.setAttribute('d', path(ul))
      }
    }
  }

  const H = s => { const d = document.createElement('div'); d.innerHTML = s; return d.firstElementChild }
  const panel = H(`<div id="${NAME}_panel"><div class="st-card">
  <button class="st-close" title="关闭">✕</button>
  <div class="st-head"><div class="st-brand"><span class="st-mark"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none"><path d="M4.6 16.8a7.5 7.5 0 1 1 14.8 0" stroke="var(--acc)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M12 12.6l3.6-2.7" stroke="var(--acc)" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="12" cy="12.6" r="1.5" fill="var(--acc)"/></svg></span><div><div class="st-dev" id="${NAME}_dev">${esc(devName())}</div><div class="st-sub">better-speedtest</div></div></div>
    <div class="st-meta"><span id="${NAME}_iface">—</span></div></div>
  <div class="st-gsec"><div class="st-gwrap" id="${NAME}_gwrap"><div class="st-gc"><div class="st-gnum"><span id="${NAME}_big">0.0</span></div><div class="st-gunit" id="${NAME}_unit">Mbps ↓</div><div class="st-glabel" id="${NAME}_glab">下载</div><div class="st-gpeak">峰值 <b id="${NAME}_peak">0.0</b></div><div class="st-gstat"><div class="st-gstat-txt" id="${NAME}_gstat">准备中…</div><div class="st-gstat-dots"><i></i><i></i><i></i></div></div></div></div></div>
  <div class="st-stats">
    <div class="st-stat"><div class="st-sk">下载</div><div class="st-sv"><span id="${NAME}_dl">0.0</span><em>Mbps</em></div></div>
    <div class="st-stat"><div class="st-sk">上传</div><div class="st-sv"><span id="${NAME}_ul">0.0</span><em>Mbps</em></div></div>
    <div class="st-stat"><div class="st-sk">延迟</div><div class="st-sv"><span id="${NAME}_lat">—</span><em>ms</em></div></div>
    <div class="st-stat"><div class="st-sk">抖动</div><div class="st-sv"><span id="${NAME}_jit">—</span><em>ms</em></div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="st-node"><span class="st-nt" id="${NAME}_nt">尚未测速</span><span class="st-ns" id="${NAME}_ns">—</span></div>
  <div class="st-csec"><div class="st-chead"><span class="st-ctitle">吞吐曲线</span><span class="st-legend"><span class="st-lg dl">下载<b id="${NAME}_lgd">0</b></span><span class="st-lg ul">上传<b id="${NAME}_lgu">0</b></span></span></div><div class="st-cwrap" id="${NAME}_cwrap"></div></div>
  <div class="st-ctrls">
    <button class="st-btn primary" data-act="start">开始测速</button>
    <button class="st-btn" data-act="ip">定位</button>
    <button class="st-btn ghost" data-act="pick">节点/源</button>
    <button class="st-btn ghost" data-act="settings">设置</button>
    <span class="st-status" id="${NAME}_st">READY</span>
  </div>
  <div class="st-picker" id="${NAME}_picker"></div>
  <div class="st-settings" id="${NAME}_setwrap"></div>
  <details class="st-log"><summary>日志<svg class="chev" width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 14 14"><path d="M5 3l4 4-4 4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></summary><div class="st-logbody" id="${NAME}_logbody">—</div></details>
  <div class="st-init" id="${NAME}_init">
    <div class="st-init-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="var(--acc)" stroke-width="1.7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 3.5v10"/><path d="M8 9.5l4 4 4-4"/><path d="M4.5 17v2a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h11a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-2"/></svg></div>
    <div class="st-init-title">初始化测速引擎</div>
    <div class="st-init-desc">首次使用需下载测速核心到本机,完成后即可开始测速。</div>
    <div class="st-init-arch" id="${NAME}_initarch">检测设备架构…</div>
    <div class="st-init-bar"><div class="st-init-fill" id="${NAME}_initfill"></div></div>
    <div class="st-init-pct" id="${NAME}_initpct"></div>
    <div class="st-init-actions"><button class="st-btn primary" data-iact="install">下载并安装</button><button class="st-btn ghost" data-iact="adv">自定义 / 手动</button></div>
    <div class="st-init-more" id="${NAME}_initmore">
      <div class="st-init-mrow"><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_initurl" placeholder="自定义二进制下载 URL(可含 {arch})"><button class="st-btn" data-iact="saveurl">保存</button></div>
      <label class="st-init-upload">手动选择二进制文件上传<input type="file" id="${NAME}_initfile" hidden></label>
      <div class="st-init-hint">手动上传请从 <a href="https://github.com/Gaimoydev/better-speedtest/releases" target="_blank" rel="noopener">https://github.com/Gaimoydev/better-speedtest/releases</a> 下载 <b>better-speedtest-linux-arm64</b></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  </div></div>`)

  const $ = id => panel.querySelector(`#${NAME}_${id}`)
  let dispMode = UI0.disp || lsGet(NAME + '_disp', 'gauge'), animMode = UI0.anim || lsGet(NAME + '_anim', 'ios')
  function buildNumber(host) {
    const blob = document.createElement('div'); blob.className = 'st-blob'; host.insertBefore(blob, host.firstChild)
    return { set(v) { const f = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, v / GA.max)); blob.style.transform = `translate(-50%,-50%) scale(${(0.7 + f * 0.55).toFixed(3)})`; blob.style.opacity = (0.22 + f * 0.5).toFixed(2) } }
  }
  function mkViz() { const h = $('gwrap'); h.querySelectorAll('svg,.st-blob').forEach(e => e.remove()); h.classList.toggle('st-num', dispMode === 'number'); return dispMode === 'number' ? buildNumber(h) : buildGauge(h) }
  let viz = mkViz()
  let bigTok = 0, rollRoot = null, rollSig = ''
  function rollTo(v) {
    const str = v.toFixed(1), big = $('big'), sig = str.replace(/[0-9]/g, '#')
    if (!rollRoot || rollSig !== sig || big.querySelector('.st-num-roll') !== rollRoot) {
      big.textContent = ''; rollRoot = document.createElement('span'); rollRoot.className = 'st-num-roll'; rollSig = sig
      for (const ch of str) {
        if (ch >= '0' && ch <= '9') {
          const col = document.createElement('span'); col.className = 'st-dcol'
          const strip = document.createElement('span'); strip.className = 'st-dstrip'
          for (let d = 0; d < 10; d++) { const s = document.createElement('span'); s.textContent = d; strip.appendChild(s) }
          strip.style.transition = 'none'; strip.style.transform = `translateY(-${+ch}em)`
          col.appendChild(strip); col._strip = strip; rollRoot.appendChild(col)
        } else { const f = document.createElement('span'); f.className = 'st-dfix'; f.textContent = ch; rollRoot.appendChild(f) }
      }
      big.appendChild(rollRoot)
      requestAnimationFrame(() => { if (rollRoot) rollRoot.querySelectorAll('.st-dstrip').forEach(s => { s.style.transition = '' }) })
      return
    }
    let i = 0
    for (const ch of str) {
      const col = rollRoot.children[i++]
      if (ch >= '0' && ch <= '9' && col && col._strip) {
        const t = `translateY(-${+ch}em)`
        if (col._strip.style.transform !== t) {
          col._strip.style.transform = t
          col._strip.classList.remove('st-roll'); void col._strip.offsetWidth; col._strip.classList.add('st-roll')
        }
      }
    }
  }
  function setBig(v) {
    if (animMode === 'none') { $('big').textContent = v.toFixed(1); return }
    if (animMode === 'ios') { rollTo(v); return }
    const from = parseFloat($('big').textContent) || 0, t0 = performance.now(), dur = 620, tok = ++bigTok
    const step = now => { if (tok !== bigTok) return; const p = Math.min((now - t0) / dur, 1), e = 1 - Math.pow(1 - p, 3); $('big').textContent = (from + (v - from) * e).toFixed(1); if (p < 1) requestAnimationFrame(step) }
    requestAnimationFrame(step)
  }

  const mask = H(`<div class="st-mask" style="display:none"></div>`)
  mask.appendChild(panel); document.body.appendChild(mask)
  panel.classList.add('modal')
  panel.querySelector('.st-close').onclick = () => hide()
  mask.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target === mask) hide() })
  function show() { panel.classList.toggle('need-init', lsGet(NAME + '_inst', '') === 'no'); const dv = $('dev'); if (dv) dv.textContent = devName(); mask.style.display = 'flex'; refreshIface(); checkInit(); requestAnimationFrame(() => mask.classList.add('st-show')) }
  function hide() { mask.classList.remove('st-show'); setTimeout(() => { if (!mask.classList.contains('st-show')) mask.style.display = 'none' }, 320) }
  const launch = H(`<button class="btn" title="better-speedtest">Better-Speedtest</button>`)
  launch.onclick = () => show()
  const actionRow = document.querySelector('.functions-container .actions-buttons') || document.querySelector('.functions-container')
  if (actionRow) actionRow.appendChild(launch)

  async function refreshIface() { const r = await sh(`ip route show default 2>/dev/null | grep -o 'dev [^ ]*' | head -1 | cut -d' ' -f2`, 4000); $('iface').textContent = (r.content || '').trim() || '—' }

  let chart = null, testing = false, stopReq = false, mccAutoStarted = false, dir = 'both', testType = lsGet(NAME + '_type', 'auto'), pickedNode = '', pickedCdn = '', pickedOokla = ''
  const setStatus = (s, warn) => { const e = $('st'); e.textContent = s; e.style.color = warn ? '#ff8a8a' : '' }
  function updateSourcePreview(kind = testType) {
    const node = kind === 'cdn' ? (pickedCdn || '自动 · CDN 择优')
      : kind === 'ookla' ? (pickedOokla || '自动 · Ookla 择优')
      : kind === 'cnspeed' ? (pickedNode || '自动 · 就近节点')
      : '自动 · CLI 决定'
    const meta = kind === 'cdn' ? 'cdn · 自定义 CDN'
      : kind === 'ookla' ? 'ookla · Speedtest.net'
      : kind === 'cnspeed' ? 'cnspeed · 全球网测'
      : 'auto · 全球网测 / CDN / Ookla'
    $('nt').textContent = node
    $('ns').textContent = meta
  }
  const startBtn = () => panel.querySelector('.st-ctrls .st-btn[data-act="start"]')
  function setTesting(on) { testing = on; const b = startBtn(); if (b) { b.textContent = on ? '停止测速' : '开始测速'; b.classList.toggle('danger', on) } }
  async function stopTest() { stopReq = true; setStatus('停止中…'); gaugeStatus('停止中…'); await sh(`for p in $(pidof better-speedtest 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 $p; done; echo stopped`, 6000) }
  function gaugeStatus(text) { const gw = $('gwrap'); gw.classList.add('st-starting'); const t = $('gstat'); if (t && t.textContent !== text) { t.textContent = text; fadeIn(t, 260) } }
  function endGaugeStatus() { $('gwrap').classList.remove('st-starting') }

  function resetViz(durS) {
    $('cwrap').innerHTML = ''; chart = buildChart($('cwrap'), durS)
    panel.querySelector('.st-gpeak').innerHTML = `峰值 <b id="${NAME}_peak">0.0</b>`
    $('glab').textContent = '下载'; $('unit').textContent = 'Mbps ↓'
    for (const id of ['big', 'dl', 'ul']) $(id).textContent = '0.0'
    $('lat').textContent = '—'; $('jit').textContent = '—'; $('lgd').textContent = '0'; $('lgu').textContent = '0'; viz.set(0)
  }

  async function runTest(kind) {
    if (testing) { setStatus('测速进行中…'); return }
    if (!(await isRoot())) { setStatus('需要 root', 1); return }
    if ((((await sh(`[ -x ${BIN} ] && echo y || echo n`, 3000)).content) || '').trim() !== 'y') { setStatus('未安装,请先初始化', 1); panel.classList.add('need-init'); checkInit(); return }
    stopReq = false; setTesting(true); setStatus('启动…')
    const cfg = await readCfg(); const durS = (cfg.engine && cfg.engine.duration_s) || 15
    resetViz(durS); gaugeStatus('正在连接测速服务…')
    let args = kind === 'cnspeed' ? 'test --json --src cnspeed' : kind === 'ookla' ? 'test --json --src ookla' : kind === 'cdn' ? 'test --json --src cdn' : 'test --json --src auto'
    if (dir === 'dl') args += ' --no-upload'; else if (dir === 'ul') args += ' --no-download'
    const picked = kind === 'cdn' ? pickedCdn : kind === 'ookla' ? pickedOokla : kind === 'cnspeed' ? pickedNode : ''
    if (picked) args += ' --node ' + shq(picked)
    updateSourcePreview(kind)
    await sh(`for p in $(pidof better-speedtest 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 $p; done; : > ${LOG}; cd ${DIR} && (${BIN} ${args} > ${LOG} 2>&1 &); echo go`, 8000)
    const t0 = performance.now(), TIMEOUT = 130000
    let done = false
    while (!done && !stopReq && performance.now() - t0 < TIMEOUT) {
      await wait(900)
      const lines = ((await sh(`cat ${LOG} 2>/dev/null`, 5000)).content || '').split('\n').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean)
      const dlPts = [], ulPts = []; let result = null, peakV = 0, phase = ''
      for (const ln of lines) {
        if (ln === 'DONE') { done = true; continue }
        const o = jparse(ln); if (!o) continue
        if (o.phase === 'result') result = o
        else if (o.phase === 'download') { dlPts.push([o.t, o.mbps]); peakV = Math.max(peakV, o.peak || o.mbps); phase = 'download' }
        else if (o.phase === 'upload') { ulPts.push([o.t, o.mbps]); phase = 'upload' }
        else if (o.msg) { const pm = o.msg.match(/ping=([\d.]+)ms/); if (pm) $('lat').textContent = Math.round(+pm[1]); setStatus(o.msg); gaugeStatus(prettyMsg(o.msg)) }
      }
      if (dlPts.length || ulPts.length) endGaugeStatus()
      if (phase === 'upload' && ulPts.length) { const v = ulPts[ulPts.length - 1][1]; viz.set(v); setBig(v); $('unit').textContent = 'Mbps ↑'; $('glab').textContent = '上传'; $('ul').textContent = v.toFixed(1); $('lgu').textContent = v.toFixed(0) }
      else if (dlPts.length) { const v = dlPts[dlPts.length - 1][1]; viz.set(v); setBig(v); $('unit').textContent = 'Mbps ↓'; $('glab').textContent = '下载'; $('dl').textContent = v.toFixed(1); $('lgd').textContent = v.toFixed(0); $('peak').textContent = peakV.toFixed(1) }
      if (chart) chart.update(dlPts, ulPts)
      const lb = $('logbody'); lb.textContent = lines.slice(-60).join('\n'); lb.scrollTop = lb.scrollHeight
      if (result) { showResult(result); done = true }
    }
    setTesting(false); endGaugeStatus()
    if (stopReq) { setStatus('已停止'); stopReq = false }
    else if (!done) { await sh(`for p in $(pidof better-speedtest 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 $p; done`, 5000); setStatus('超时(见日志)', 1) }
  }

  function showResult(o) {
    const dl = +o.dl_avg || 0, ul = +o.ul_avg || 0, pingRaw = +o.ping || 0, jitRaw = +o.jitter || 0, ping = Math.round(pingRaw), jit = Math.round(jitRaw)
    const hasDl = !!o.dl_avg, hasUl = !!o.ul_avg && !o.ul_msg
    const hasPing = pingRaw > 0, hasJit = jitRaw > 0
    if (hasDl) { $('dl').textContent = dl.toFixed(1); $('lgd').textContent = dl.toFixed(0) }
    $('ul').textContent = o.ul_msg ? '不支持' : (hasUl ? ul.toFixed(1) : '—')
    if (hasUl) $('lgu').textContent = ul.toFixed(0)
    $('lat').textContent = hasPing ? ping : '—'; $('jit').textContent = hasJit ? jit : '—'
    $('nt').textContent = o.node || '—'
    $('ns').textContent = [o.source, o.carrier, o.city].filter(Boolean).join(' · ') || '—'
    const heroDl = hasDl, hero = heroDl ? dl : ul
    viz.set(hero); setBig(hero)
    $('unit').textContent = heroDl ? 'Mbps ↓' : 'Mbps ↑'
    $('glab').textContent = '测速完成'
    const parts = []
    if (heroDl && hasUl) parts.push(`↑ <b>${ul.toFixed(1)}</b>`)
    else if (!heroDl && hasDl) parts.push(`↓ <b>${dl.toFixed(1)}</b>`)
    if (heroDl && o.dl_peak) parts.push(`峰 <b>${(+o.dl_peak).toFixed(1)}</b>`)
    if (hasPing) parts.push(`延迟 <b>${ping}</b>ms`)
    if (hasJit) parts.push(`抖 <b>${jit}</b>`)
    if (o.ul_msg && heroDl) parts.push('上传不支持')
    const gp = panel.querySelector('.st-gpeak'); gp.innerHTML = parts.join(' · '); fadeIn(gp, 420); fadeIn($('glab'), 380)
    setStatus(o.ul_msg ? '完成 · 上传不支持' : '完成')
  }

  let pickerTab = 'near', pickerCache = {}
  async function openPicker(tab) {
    const w = $('picker')
    if (w.classList.contains('on') && !tab) { w.classList.remove('on'); return }
    $('setwrap').classList.remove('on')
    w.classList.add('on'); fadeIn(w, 300)
    w.innerHTML = `<div class="st-pk-tabs">
        <button class="st-pk-tab" data-t="near">就近节点</button>
        <button class="st-pk-tab" data-t="full">全量表</button>
        <button class="st-pk-tab" data-t="ookla">Ookla</button>
        <button class="st-pk-tab" data-t="cdn">自定义 CDN</button>
        <button class="st-pk-tab" data-t="_x" style="margin-left:auto">✕</button>
      </div><div class="st-pk-list" id="${NAME}_pklist"></div>`
    w.querySelectorAll('.st-pk-tab').forEach(b => b.onclick = () => { if (b.dataset.t === '_x') { w.classList.remove('on'); return } renderPicker(b.dataset.t) })
    renderPicker(tab || pickerTab || 'near')
  }
  async function loadPicker(tab) {
    if (tab === 'near')
      return jparse(((await sh(`${BIN} nodes --src cnspeed 2>/dev/null`, 40000)).content || '').trim()) || []
    if (tab === 'full') {
      try { const o = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(NAME + '_fulltbl') || 'null'); if (o && o.ts && Date.now() - o.ts < 86400000 && Array.isArray(o.d) && o.d.length) return o.d } catch (e) {}
      const list = jparse(((await sh(`${BIN} nodes --src cnspeed --full 2>/dev/null`, 60000)).content || '').trim()) || []
      if (list.length) { try { localStorage.setItem(NAME + '_fulltbl', JSON.stringify({ ts: Date.now(), d: list })) } catch (e) {} }
      return list
    }
    if (tab === 'ookla') {
      if (pickerCache.ookla) return pickerCache.ookla
      const list = jparse(((await sh(`${BIN} nodes --src ookla 2>/dev/null`, 40000)).content || '').trim()) || []
      pickerCache.ookla = list; return list
    }
    if (pickerCache.cdn) return pickerCache.cdn
    const list = jparse(((await sh(`${BIN} nodes --src cdn 2>/dev/null`, 30000)).content || '').trim()) || []
    pickerCache.cdn = list; return list
  }
  async function renderPicker(tab) {
    pickerTab = tab
    const w = $('picker')
    w.querySelectorAll('.st-pk-tab').forEach(b => b.classList.toggle('on', b.dataset.t === tab))
    const listEl = $('pklist'); listEl.innerHTML = `<div class="st-pk-empty">加载中…</div>`
    const list = await loadPicker(tab)
    const isCdn = tab === 'cdn', isOokla = tab === 'ookla', cur = isCdn ? pickedCdn : isOokla ? pickedOokla : pickedNode
    let html = `<div class="st-pk-row${cur ? '' : ' sel'}" data-v=""><span class="st-pk-name">${isCdn ? '自动 · CDN 择优' : isOokla ? '自动 · Ookla 择优' : '自动 · 就近'}</span><span class="st-pk-meta"></span><span class="st-pk-tag">AUTO</span></div>`
    if (!list.length) html += `<div class="st-pk-empty">列表为空(${isCdn ? 'CDN' : isOokla ? 'Ookla' : '节点'}拉取失败或无数据)</div>`
    else html += list.map(n => {
      const v = n.name || n.host_ip
      const meta = (isCdn || isOokla) ? (n.dl_url || n.dl || '') : ((n.city || '') + ' ' + (n.host_ip || '') + ':' + (n.port || ''))
      const tag = isOokla ? 'Ookla' : isCdn ? (n.region === 'global' ? '海外' : '国内') : (n.carrier || '')
      return `<div class="st-pk-row${cur === v ? ' sel' : ''}" data-v="${esc(v)}"><span class="st-pk-name">${esc(n.name || v)}</span><span class="st-pk-meta">${esc(meta)}</span><span class="st-pk-tag">${esc(tag)}</span></div>`
    }).join('')
    listEl.innerHTML = html
    listEl.querySelectorAll('.st-pk-row').forEach(r => r.onclick = () => {
      const v = r.dataset.v
      if (isCdn) { pickedCdn = v; setStatus(v ? ('CDN 源: ' + v) : 'CDN 自动') }
      else if (isOokla) { pickedOokla = v; setStatus(v ? ('Ookla: ' + v) : 'Ookla 自动') }
      else { pickedNode = v; setStatus(v ? ('已选节点: ' + v) : '自动就近') }
      updateSourcePreview(isCdn ? 'cdn' : isOokla ? 'ookla' : 'cnspeed')
      listEl.querySelectorAll('.st-pk-row').forEach(x => x.classList.toggle('sel', x === r))
    })
  }

  const goArch = a => ({ x86_64: 'amd64', aarch64: 'arm64', armv7l: 'armv7', armv6l: 'armv6', i386: '386', i686: '386', loongarch64: 'loong64' })[a] || a
  function binUrls(inst, goarch) {
    const out = [], seen = new Set()
    const add = u => { if (u && !seen.has(u)) { seen.add(u); out.push(u) } }
    if (inst && inst.binary_url) add(((inst.proxy || '').trim()) + inst.binary_url.replace(/\{arch\}/g, goarch))
    for (const s of BIN_SOURCES) add((s.proxy || '') + s.url.replace(/\{arch\}/g, goarch))
    return out
  }
  async function binaryRuns(pathTo) { const v = (((await sh(`${pathTo} version 2>/dev/null`, 8000)).content) || '').trim(); return /better-speedtest/i.test(v) ? v : '' }
  async function downloadOne(full, onProg, log) {
    let total = 0
    try { const h = (((await sh(`curl -sIL --connect-timeout 12 ${shq(full)} 2>/dev/null | tr -d '\\r' | awk 'tolower($1)=="content-length:"{v=$2} END{print v+0}'`, 20000)).content) || '').trim(); total = parseInt(h) || 0 } catch (e) {}
    await sh(`rm -f ${BIN}.tmp ${BIN}.flag; mkdir -p ${DIR}; ( curl -fL --retry 1 --connect-timeout 15 --max-time 170 -o ${BIN}.tmp ${shq(full)} 2>/dev/null && echo ok > ${BIN}.flag || echo fail > ${BIN}.flag ) & echo started`, 8000)
    const t0 = performance.now(), TIMEOUT = 180000; let flag = ''
    while (performance.now() - t0 < TIMEOUT) {
      await wait(500)
      const r = ((await sh(`wc -c < ${BIN}.tmp 2>/dev/null; echo ---; cat ${BIN}.flag 2>/dev/null`, 5000)).content) || ''
      const parts = r.split('---'); const got = parseInt((parts[0] || '').trim()) || 0; flag = (parts[1] || '').trim()
      onProg && onProg(total ? Math.min(got / total, 1) : 0, got, total)
      if (flag) break
    }
    if (flag !== 'ok') { await sh(`for p in $(pidof curl 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 $p; done; rm -f ${BIN}.tmp ${BIN}.flag`, 5000); return false }
    await sh(`chmod +x ${BIN}.tmp`)
    if (!(await binaryRuns(`${BIN}.tmp`))) { log && log('✗ 非可用二进制(损坏/错架构)'); await sh(`rm -f ${BIN}.tmp ${BIN}.flag`); return false }
    await sh(`mv ${BIN}.tmp ${BIN} && chmod +x ${BIN}; rm -f ${BIN}.flag`); return true
  }
  async function installFromFile(file, onProg, log) {
    try {
      const buf = new Uint8Array(await file.arrayBuffer())
      let s = ''; const CS = 32768
      for (let i = 0; i < buf.length; i += CS) s += String.fromCharCode.apply(null, buf.subarray(i, i + CS))
      const b64 = btoa(s)
      log && log('写入设备…'); onProg && onProg(.1)
      await sh(`mkdir -p ${DIR}; rm -f ${BIN}.b64 ${BIN}.tmp`, 6000)
      const CH = 60000
      for (let i = 0; i < b64.length; i += CH) {
        await sh(`printf '%s' '${b64.slice(i, i + CH)}' >> ${BIN}.b64`, 12000)
        onProg && onProg(Math.min(.1 + .75 * (i / b64.length), .85))
      }
      const r = ((await sh(`base64 -d ${BIN}.b64 > ${BIN}.tmp 2>/dev/null && chmod +x ${BIN}.tmp && rm -f ${BIN}.b64 && echo ok`, 30000)).content) || ''
      onProg && onProg(.92)
      if (!/ok/.test(r) || !(await binaryRuns(`${BIN}.tmp`))) { log && log('✗ 非可用二进制(选错文件/架构?)'); await sh(`rm -f ${BIN}.tmp ${BIN}.b64`); return false }
      await sh(`mv ${BIN}.tmp ${BIN} && chmod +x ${BIN}`); onProg && onProg(1); return true
    } catch (e) { log && log('✗ 读取文件失败: ' + (e && e.message || e)); return false }
  }
  async function installOrUpdate(logEl) {
    const say = m => { if (logEl) { logEl.textContent += m + '\n'; logEl.scrollTop = logEl.scrollHeight } LOG_TAG(m) }
    return installWithProgress(null, say)
  }

  async function uninstallCore(logEl) {
    const say = m => { if (logEl) { logEl.textContent += m + '\n'; logEl.scrollTop = logEl.scrollHeight } LOG_TAG(m) }
    say('停止测速进程…')
    stopReq = true
    setTesting(false)
    endGaugeStatus()
    const out = ((await sh(`for p in $(pidof better-speedtest 2>/dev/null); do kill -9 $p; done; rm -rf ${DIR}; rm -f ${LOG} /tmp/better-speedtest-mccmnc-update.log; [ ! -e ${DIR} ] && echo ok || echo fail`, 12000)).content || '').trim()
    const ok = /\bok\b/.test(out)
    if (ok) {
      lsSet(NAME + '_inst', 'no')
      mccAutoStarted = false
      panel.classList.add('need-init')
      $('initfill').style.width = '0'
      $('initpct').textContent = '测速核心已卸载'
      const ib = panel.querySelector('.st-init .st-btn[data-iact="install"]'); if (ib) { ib.disabled = false; ib.textContent = '下载并安装' }
      $('nt').textContent = '尚未测速'
      $('ns').textContent = '—'
      setStatus('已卸载测速核心')
      say('已删除 ' + DIR)
    } else {
      setStatus('卸载失败', 1)
      say(out || '卸载失败')
    }
    return ok
  }

  async function autoUpdateMccMnc() {
    if (mccAutoStarted) return
    mccAutoStarted = true
    await sh(`[ -x ${BIN} ] && (cd ${DIR} && ${BIN} update --if-stale --quiet >/tmp/better-speedtest-mccmnc-update.log 2>&1 &) || true`, 3000)
  }

  async function checkInit() {
    const installed = (((await sh(`[ -x ${BIN} ] && echo y || echo n`, 4000)).content) || '').trim() === 'y'
    lsSet(NAME + '_inst', installed ? 'yes' : 'no')
    panel.classList.toggle('need-init', !installed)
    if (installed) autoUpdateMccMnc()
    if (!installed) { const a = (((await sh('uname -m', 3000)).content) || '').trim(); $('initarch').textContent = `设备架构 ${a} → ${goArch(a)}` }
  }
  async function installWithProgress(onProg, log) {
    const inst = (await readCfg()).install || {}
    const goarch = goArch((((await sh('uname -m', 3000)).content) || '').trim())
    const urls = binUrls(inst, goarch)
    for (let i = 0; i < urls.length; i++) {
      log && log(`下载源 ${i + 1}/${urls.length} · ${urls[i].replace(/^https?:\/\//, '').slice(0, 42)}…`)
      onProg && onProg(0, 0, 0)
      if (await downloadOne(urls[i], onProg, log)) return true
    }
    return false
  }
  const initDone = () => {
    lsSet(NAME + '_inst', 'yes'); $('initfill').style.width = '100%'; $('initpct').textContent = '✓ 安装完成'
    const ib = panel.querySelector('.st-init .st-btn[data-iact="install"]'); if (ib) { ib.textContent = '完成 ✓'; ib.disabled = true }
    setTimeout(() => {
      const init = panel.querySelector('.st-init')
      init.style.transition = 'opacity .3s ease,transform .34s cubic-bezier(.32,.72,0,1)'; init.style.opacity = '0'; init.style.transform = 'scale(.97)'
      setTimeout(() => { panel.classList.remove('need-init'); init.removeAttribute('style'); const im = $('initmore'); if (im) im.style.display = 'none'; if (ib) { ib.disabled = false; ib.textContent = '下载并安装' } panel.classList.add('st-reveal'); setTimeout(() => panel.classList.remove('st-reveal'), 620); refreshIface(); autoUpdateMccMnc() }, 320)
    }, 700)
  }
  async function runInstall() {
    const btn = panel.querySelector('.st-init .st-btn[data-iact="install"]'); if (!btn || btn.disabled) return
    btn.disabled = true; btn.textContent = '下载中…'; $('initpct').textContent = '准备下载…'; $('initfill').style.width = '0'
    const ok = await installWithProgress((pct, got, total) => {
      $('initfill').style.width = Math.round(pct * 100) + '%'
      $('initpct').textContent = total ? `${(got / 1048576).toFixed(1)} / ${(total / 1048576).toFixed(1)} MB · ${Math.round(pct * 100)}%` : (got ? `已下载 ${(got / 1048576).toFixed(1)} MB…` : '下载中…')
    }, m => { $('initpct').textContent = m })
    if (ok) initDone()
    else { btn.disabled = false; btn.textContent = '重试下载'; $('initpct').textContent = '✗ 所有下载源失败,可填自定义源或手动上传文件'; $('initmore').style.display = 'flex' }
  }
  async function runFileInstall(file) {
    if (!file) return
    const btn = panel.querySelector('.st-init .st-btn[data-iact="install"]'); if (btn) btn.disabled = true
    $('initpct').textContent = '安装本地文件…'; $('initfill').style.width = '0'
    const ok = await installFromFile(file, pct => { $('initfill').style.width = Math.round(pct * 100) + '%' }, m => { $('initpct').textContent = m })
    if (ok) initDone(); else { if (btn) btn.disabled = false; $('initpct').textContent = '✗ 本地文件安装失败(需选对应架构的 better-speedtest 二进制)' }
  }
  panel.querySelectorAll('.st-init [data-iact]').forEach(b => b.onclick = async () => {
    const a = b.dataset.iact
    if (a === 'install') runInstall()
    else if (a === 'adv') { const m = $('initmore'); m.style.display = m.style.display === 'flex' ? 'none' : 'flex' }
    else if (a === 'saveurl') { const u = $('initurl').value.trim(); if (u) { await patchCfg({ install: { binary_url: u } }); $('initpct').textContent = '已设自定义源,点「下载并安装」重试' } }
  })
  $('initfile').onchange = ev => runFileInstall(ev.target.files && ev.target.files[0])

  let built = false
  function openSettings(force) { const w = $('setwrap'); const on = force ? true : !w.classList.contains('on'); if (on) $('picker').classList.remove('on'); w.classList.toggle('on', on); if (on) { fadeIn(w, 300); if (!built) buildSettings() } }
  async function buildSettings() {
    built = true; const cfg = await readCfg(); const e = cfg.engine || {}, m = cfg.manual || {}, inst = cfg.install || {}
    const w = $('setwrap')
    w.innerHTML = `
    <div class="st-fs"><h4>测速</h4>
      <div class="st-row"><label>类型</label><div class="st-seg-toggle" id="${NAME}_typesel"><button data-tp="auto" class="${testType === 'auto' ? 'on' : ''}">自动</button><button data-tp="cnspeed" class="${testType === 'cnspeed' ? 'on' : ''}">全球网测</button><button data-tp="ookla" class="${testType === 'ookla' ? 'on' : ''}">Ookla</button><button data-tp="cdn" class="${testType === 'cdn' ? 'on' : ''}">自定义 CDN 源</button></div></div>
      <div class="st-row"><label>方向</label><div class="st-seg-toggle" id="${NAME}_dir"><button data-dir="both" class="${dir === 'both' ? 'on' : ''}">上下行</button><button data-dir="dl" class="${dir === 'dl' ? 'on' : ''}">仅下行</button><button data-dir="ul" class="${dir === 'ul' ? 'on' : ''}">仅上行</button></div></div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted2)">自动由 CLI 决定使用全球网测、CDN 或 Speedtest.net;具体节点/源在「节点/源」里选。</div></div>
    <div class="st-fs"><h4>布局与显示</h4>
      <div class="st-row"><label>主色</label><input type="color" class="st-color" id="${NAME}_accpick" value="${/^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/.test(ACC) ? ACC : '#5be9c6'}"><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_acc" value="${esc(ACC)}" style="width:100px"><span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted2)">点色块选颜色 · 即时生效</span></div>
      <div class="st-row"><label>测速盘</label><div class="st-seg-toggle" id="${NAME}_dispsel"><button data-d="gauge" class="${dispMode === 'gauge' ? 'on' : ''}">测速盘</button><button data-d="number" class="${dispMode === 'number' ? 'on' : ''}">纯数字</button></div><label style="min-width:auto">数字动画</label><div class="st-seg-toggle" id="${NAME}_animsel"><button data-a="ios" class="${animMode === 'ios' ? 'on' : ''}">iOS26</button><button data-a="normal" class="${animMode === 'normal' ? 'on' : ''}">正常</button><button data-a="none" class="${animMode === 'none' ? 'on' : ''}">无</button></div></div>
      <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted2)">测速盘样式与动画即时切换。</div></div>
    <div class="st-fs"><h4>运营商 / 定位覆盖</h4><div class="st-row"><label>运营商</label>${selHTML(NAME + '_op', '', [{ v: '', label: '自动' }, { v: '移动', label: '移动' }, { v: '联通', label: '联通' }, { v: '电信', label: '电信' }, { v: '广电', label: '广电' }], m.carrier)}<input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_prov" placeholder="省" value="${esc(m.province)}" style="width:78px"><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_city" placeholder="市" value="${esc(m.city)}" style="width:78px"></div></div>
    <div class="st-fs"><h4>测速参数</h4><div class="st-row"><label>下载线程</label><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_tdl" type="number" value="${esc(e.threads_dl || 8)}" style="width:66px"><label style="min-width:auto">上传</label><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_tul" type="number" value="${esc(e.threads_ul || 4)}" style="width:66px"><label style="min-width:auto">时长s</label><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_dur" type="number" value="${esc(e.duration_s || 15)}" style="width:66px"><label style="min-width:auto">WAN</label><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_if" placeholder="auto" value="${esc(e.wan_iface === 'auto' ? '' : e.wan_iface)}" style="width:96px"></div></div>
    <div class="st-fs wide"><h4>自定义测速源 (CDN)</h4><div id="${NAME}_cdnlist"></div><button class="st-btn ghost" id="${NAME}_cdnadd" style="margin-top:2px">+ 添加</button><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--muted2);margin-top:6px">上传测试会 POST 到该 URL,不支持则显示“不行”。</div></div>
    <div class="st-fs wide"><h4>二进制下载 / 更新源</h4><div class="st-row"><label>binary_url</label><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_burl" value="${esc(inst.binary_url || DEFAULT_BIN_URL)}" placeholder="${esc(DEFAULT_BIN_URL)}"></div><div class="st-row"><label>manifest</label><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_murl" value="${esc(inst.manifest_url)}" placeholder="可选,含 sha256"></div><div class="st-row"><label>代理前缀</label><input class="st-input" id="${NAME}_prx" value="${esc(inst.proxy)}" placeholder="https://ghfast.top/"></div><div class="st-row"><button class="st-btn primary" id="${NAME}_install">安装 / 更新</button><button class="st-btn" id="${NAME}_updtbl">更新运营商表</button><button class="st-btn danger" id="${NAME}_uninstall">卸载测速核心</button></div><div class="st-logbody" id="${NAME}_instlog" style="display:none;border:1px solid var(--line2);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;margin-top:6px"></div></div>
    <div class="st-fs"><div class="st-row"><button class="st-btn primary" id="${NAME}_save">保存设置</button><span id="${NAME}_savemsg" style="font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted)"></span></div></div>`
    w.querySelectorAll(`#${NAME}_typesel button`).forEach(b => b.onclick = () => { testType = b.dataset.tp; lsSet(NAME + '_type', testType); b.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(x => x.classList.toggle('on', x === b)); updateSourcePreview(testType); setStatus(({ auto: '类型: 自动', cnspeed: '类型: 全球网测', ookla: '类型: Ookla', cdn: '类型: 自定义 CDN 源' })[testType] || '类型: 自动') })
    w.querySelectorAll(`#${NAME}_dir button`).forEach(b => b.onclick = () => { dir = b.dataset.dir; b.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(x => x.classList.toggle('on', x === b)) })
    w.querySelectorAll(`#${NAME}_dispsel button`).forEach(b => b.onclick = () => { dispMode = b.dataset.d; lsSet(NAME + '_disp', dispMode); saveUI({ disp: dispMode }); b.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(x => x.classList.toggle('on', x === b)); viz = mkViz(); viz.set(0); $('big').textContent = '0.0' })
    w.querySelectorAll(`#${NAME}_animsel button`).forEach(b => b.onclick = () => { animMode = b.dataset.a; lsSet(NAME + '_anim', animMode); saveUI({ anim: animMode }); b.parentElement.querySelectorAll('button').forEach(x => x.classList.toggle('on', x === b)); rollRoot = null; $('big').textContent = '0.0' })
    const applyAcc = c => { c = (c || '').trim(); if (!/^#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}$/.test(c)) return; lsSet(NAME + '_acc', c); saveUI({ acc: c }); panel.style.setProperty('--acc', c); const ai = w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_acc`), ap = w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_accpick`); if (ai) ai.value = c; if (ap && /^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/.test(c)) ap.value = c }
    w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_accpick`).oninput = ev => applyAcc(ev.target.value)
    w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_acc`).onchange = ev => applyAcc(ev.target.value)
    if (!panel._dropWired) { panel._dropWired = true; panel.addEventListener('click', ev => { const opt = ev.target.closest('.st-drop-opt'); const btn = ev.target.closest('.st-drop-btn'); if (opt) { const d = opt.closest('.st-drop'); d.dataset.value = opt.dataset.v; d.querySelector('.st-drop-btn').firstChild.textContent = opt.textContent; d.querySelectorAll('.st-drop-opt').forEach(o => o.classList.toggle('on', o === opt)); d.classList.remove('open'); return } if (btn) { const d = btn.closest('.st-drop'); const was = d.classList.contains('open'); panel.querySelectorAll('.st-drop.open').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('open')); if (!was) d.classList.add('open'); return } panel.querySelectorAll('.st-drop.open').forEach(x => x.classList.remove('open')) }) }
    const cdnList = w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_cdnlist`)
    const cdnRow = (s = {}) => { const row = H(`<div class="st-cdn-item"><input class="st-input st-cdn-name" placeholder="名称" value="${esc(s.name)}" style="max-width:100px"><input class="st-input st-cdn-url" placeholder="下载 URL" value="${esc(s.dl)}">${selHTML('', 'st-cdn-region', [{ v: 'cn', label: '国内' }, { v: 'global', label: '海外' }], s.region === 'global' ? 'global' : 'cn')}<span class="st-x">✕</span></div>`); row.querySelector('.st-x').onclick = () => row.remove(); return row }
    const cdnEff = jparse(((await sh(`${BIN} nodes --src cdn 2>/dev/null`, 20000)).content || '').trim()) || []
    const cdnInit = cdnEff.length ? cdnEff.map(n => ({ name: n.name, dl: n.dl_url || n.dl, ul: n.ul_url || n.ul, region: n.region }))
                                  : (cfg.cdn_sources && cfg.cdn_sources.length ? cfg.cdn_sources : [])
    cdnInit.forEach(s => cdnList.appendChild(cdnRow(s)))
    w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_cdnadd`).onclick = () => cdnList.appendChild(cdnRow())
    w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_install`).onclick = async () => { const il = w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_instlog`); il.style.display = 'block'; il.textContent = ''; await saveSettings(true); const ok = await installOrUpdate(il); setStatus(ok ? '安装完成' : '安装失败', !ok) }
    w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_updtbl`).onclick = async () => { setStatus('更新表…'); setStatus(((await sh(`${BIN} update 2>&1`, 60000)).content || '').trim().slice(0, 50)) }
    w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_uninstall`).onclick = async () => { const il = w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_instlog`); il.style.display = 'block'; il.textContent = ''; await uninstallCore(il) }
    w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_save`).onclick = () => saveSettings(false)
  }
  async function saveSettings(silent) {
    const w = $('setwrap'), g = id => w.querySelector(`#${NAME}_${id}`)
    const cdn = Array.from(w.querySelectorAll('.st-cdn-item')).map(r => ({ name: r.querySelector('.st-cdn-name').value.trim(), dl: r.querySelector('.st-cdn-url').value.trim(), region: r.querySelector('.st-cdn-region').dataset.value })).filter(x => x.name && x.dl)
    const patch = { manual: { carrier: g('op').dataset.value, province: g('prov').value.trim(), city: g('city').value.trim() }, engine: { threads_dl: +g('tdl').value || 8, threads_ul: +g('tul').value || 4, duration_s: +g('dur').value || 15, wan_iface: g('if').value.trim() || 'auto' }, install: { binary_url: g('burl').value.trim(), manifest_url: g('murl').value.trim(), proxy: g('prx').value.trim() } }
    if (cdn.length) patch.cdn_sources = cdn
    await patchCfg(patch)
    if (!silent) { const msg = g('savemsg'); if (msg) { msg.textContent = '已保存 ✓'; setTimeout(() => msg.textContent = '', 2500) } }
  }

  panel.querySelectorAll('.st-ctrls .st-btn[data-act]').forEach(b => b.onclick = async () => {
    const a = b.dataset.act
    if (a === 'start') { if (testing) stopTest(); else runTest(testType) }
    else if (a === 'ip') { if (!(await isRoot())) return setStatus('需要 root', 1); setStatus('定位中…'); const o = jparse(((await sh(`${BIN} ip 2>/dev/null`, 30000)).content || '').trim()); if (o) { $('nt').textContent = `${o.carrier || '?'} · ${o.province || ''}${o.city || ''}`; $('ns').textContent = `${o.ip || ''} · ${o.region || ''}`; setStatus('定位完成') } else setStatus('定位失败', 1) }
    else if (a === 'pick') openPicker(testType === 'cdn' ? 'cdn' : testType === 'ookla' ? 'ookla' : 'near')
    else if (a === 'settings') openSettings()
  })

  refreshIface()
  LOG_TAG('v2 loaded')
})()
//</script >
